title: Silex notering stundar: Glödhet pärla att teckna
summary_md:
# Silex notering stundar: Glödhet pärla att teckna

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-04  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode focuses on the upcoming IPO of Silex, the world's largest MEMS foundry (advanced contract chip manufacturer), listing on Nasdaq Stockholm on 7 May 2026. Hosts describe a diversified, profitable business that has grown ~17% annually for a decade, with AI/datacenter optical switches and consumer segments expected to drive 12-13% growth toward 2030 and a 30% operating margin target. The framing is clearly bullish — the IPO is pitched as a 'hot pearl to subscribe to'.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SILEX — Silex | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 70%

World leader in MEMS foundry niche, 3 of the Magnificent Seven as customers, diversified revenue, ~17%/yr 10-yr growth, AI/consumer tailwinds, 30% op-margin target seen as realistic.

#### Reasoning

Hosts pitch the IPO as a 'glödhet pärla att teckna'. Silex is the global leader in its MEMS niche with high barriers, diversified end-markets (auto, medtech, datacenter, consumer) reducing cyclicality, a strong ~17% 10-yr growth record, and credible 12-13% forward growth plus a realistic 30% operating-margin target. AI/datacenter optical switches add upside; listing funds North American expansion and ownership cleanup from a Chinese major holder.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI/telecom segment growth disappoints
- if high-volume production projects fail to convert from development projects
- if operating margin stalls below the 30% target
- if North American fab expansion overruns

> *"Silex är störst i världen på det här. Och som du säger, tre av märkts även bolagen är kunder. Och det är ju ändå ett otroligt betyg, får man säga."*

---
